params.context: Genspark iter 8 — page-load level axis (per directive). 7 iter on /api/agent/ask_proxy XHR exhausted (Nuxt error boundary persists). Now intercept BOTH the XHR and the SPA navigation route: path_patterns expanded from '/api/agent/ask_proxy' → '/api/agent/ask_proxy,/agents'. envelope_template (id=12) replaced from SSE → HTTP/1.1 200 + Content-Type: text/html with full warning HTML page body ({{MESSAGE_RAW}} embedded inside .m div). Expectation: when user submits prompt, engine intercepts XHR → page navigates to /agents?id=<new> → page-load engine intercept returns HTML warning page, replacing Nuxt SPA shell with our full HTML. Note: block_page_load column exists in DB but code doesn't reference it yet (page_load_intercept_migration pending) — so this iter relies on path_patterns broadening + HTML body to /api/agent/ask_proxy XHR. If Nuxt fetch swallows HTML body silently, this iter falsifies the HTML-page-on-XHR hypothesis. Backup: pre_iter_chatglm12_qianwen7_genspark8_20260518_085011.sql.
